name: What if my claim gets denied after slip at warehouse job?
description: Appeal fast with lawyer and doctor proof—most denials overturn.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if my claim gets denied after slip at warehouse job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal fast with lawyer and doctor proof—most denials overturn.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within 20 days in Utah or request Idaho Industrial Commission hearing.** Common denials cite 'no work relation' or pre-existing issues—provide more medical proof.[1][4] Hire an attorney; they win 70% of appeals. Key: strong doctor nexus letter linking fall to symptoms. Don't sign insurer releases hastily. Persistence often leads to approval or settlement.
